title: Flawlessly Roasted Australian Butternut Squash Bowl
description: A light and satisfying solo dinner featuring roasted butternut squash, crispy toast, and a hint of Australian bush spices.
instructions: Cut the butternut squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
Place the squash on a baking sheet, cut side up, and drizzle with 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Roast the squash in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
While the squash is roasting, cook the chopped onion and minced garlic in a pan over medium heat until softened.
Add the ground cumin and smoked paprika to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Season the squash with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove the squash from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Scoop the flesh of the squash into a bowl and top with the cooked onion and garlic mixture.
Toast the bread slices until crispy and sprinkle with crumbled feta cheese.
Serve the roasted squash in a lacquerware bowl with toasted bread on the side.
